Guides

Support Hub

Everything you need to get the most out of WorkKudo, all in one place.

Can't find what you need?
🚀

Getting Started

Everything you need to launch your first WorkKudo board.

🎉

Create a Board

Choose an occasion, pick a template, and personalise your board in under two minutes.

✉️

Invite Contributors

Share your unique invite link via email, Notion, or any messaging platform.

💬

Add Messages & Photos

Team members can add text, photos, GIFs, and drawings — no account required.

🎁

Deliver a Board

Schedule delivery or send immediately. The recipient gets a beautiful notification.

💳

Account & Billing

Manage your subscription, team accounts, and payment details.

🔄

Manage Subscription

Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan anytime from your account dashboard.

👥

Team Accounts

Add seats, manage member permissions, and control access across your organisation.

💰

Payment Questions

Update billing details, view invoices, and get answers about charges and prorations.

🤝

Need Help?

Couldn't find what you're looking for? Our team is here.

Appreciation Handbook

Build a Culture of Recognition

Everything you need to make appreciation a habit — not an afterthought.

Why It Matters

Recognition isn't a perk.
It's a performance driver.

Employees who feel genuinely appreciated stay longer, perform better, and lift everyone around them. WorkKudo makes it effortless to celebrate the people who make a difference — every single day.

📉63%less likely to job-hunt
🤝2×stronger team culture
📈40%higher engagement
Best Practices

5 Ways to Make Recognition Land

01🎯
Be SpecificName the exact action or behaviour you're recognising. "Your calm handling of the client issue on Tuesday" lands much better than "great job this week."
02⚡
Be TimelyRecognition loses impact when delayed. Celebrate wins as close to the moment as possible — ideally the same day or week.
03💛
Be AuthenticGenuine recognition resonates. Skip the corporate script and write from the heart — even two sincere sentences outperform a polished paragraph.
04🏅
Celebrate MilestonesWork anniversaries, project completions, promotions, and personal life events all deserve acknowledgment. Make every milestone feel special.
05🤝
Encourage Peer RecognitionRecognition shouldn't only flow top-down. Build a culture where teammates celebrate each other openly — it multiplies engagement across the whole team.
Real Examples

Recognition Messages That Resonate

Happy Birthday, Sarah!🎂 Birthday
M

"Wishing you the most amazing birthday! Your energy and creativity light up every room. So grateful to have you on our team. Here's to another incredible year! 🎉"

— From the entire Marketing team
👍 Like💬 Reply✨ Celebrate
5 Years with WorkKudo, James!🏆 Work Anniversary
&

"Five years of incredible dedication, growth, and impact. Your technical leadership has shaped who we are as a company. Thank you for everything you bring to the team every single day. 🙌"

— From Engineering & Leadership
👍 Like💬 Reply✨ Celebrate
Product Launch — Crushed It!🌟 Team Achievement
&

"What a launch! Every single one of you brought something extraordinary to this project. The way this team collaborates and supports each other is truly something special. Proud of every one of you. 💚"

— From Product & Design
👍 Like💬 Reply✨ Celebrate
Thank You, Priya💌 Manager Appreciation
e

"Thank you for always making time for us, pushing us to grow, and celebrating our wins as loudly as you do. You're not just a great manager — you're an amazing human. We appreciate you endlessly. ✨"

— From your entire team
👍 Like💬 Reply✨ Celebrate
